title: CTO heartbeat
summary: First CTO heartbeat — took ownership of RT-4 critical bug, documented SK-2 root cause, flagged P1 sizing and analytics risks, recommended server-side push migration for P2, published full technical assessment.
contextSummary: RT-4 investigation in progress (hypothesis: OS background task throttling). SK-2 fix approach documented (UTC migration). OB-3 undersized. Zero stories in progress — execution velocity is the binding constraint. Job routing verified correct.
